summary: Completed backend and frontend testing of Dashboard Resumen Ejecutivo feature. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All dashboard elements verified working correctly.

GET /api/dashboard/resumen-ejecutivo.details: Returns all required fields: ventas_pendientes_cantidad (4072), ventas_pendientes_monto (S/ 3,982,644.50), gastos_prorrateo_cantidad (2), gastos_prorrateo_monto (S/ 1,770.00), cobranza_pendiente_total (S/ 900.00), cobranza_pendiente_linea (array), ingresos_mes (0.00), gastos_mes (S/ 1,770.00), resultado_neto (-S/ 1,770.00), utilidad_linea (array with 3 líneas)

GET /api/dashboard/kpis_legacy.details: Legacy endpoint still works with all 8 KPI fields

API_data_consistency.details: cobranza_pendiente_total matches total_cxc, gastos_mes consistent between endpoints

API_utilidad_calculations.details: utilidad_antes_prorrateo = ingresos - gastos_directos, utilidad_despues_prorrateo = ingresos - gastos_directos - gastos_prorrateados

Frontend_Panel_de_Control_header.details: Dashboard loads with 'Panel de Control' header and 'Resumen ejecutivo del mes actual' subtitle

Frontend_alerts_section.details: 3 alert cards visible: '4072 ventas pendientes por revisar' (yellow), '2 gastos sin prorratear' (purple), 'Cobranza pendiente' (red)

Frontend_4_KPI_cards.details: All 4 KPI cards present: Ingresos del Mes (S/ 0.00), Gastos del Mes (S/ 1,770.00), Resultado Neto (S/ -1,770.00), Cobranza Pendiente (S/ 900.00)

Frontend_utilidad_linea_table.details: Table with 6 columns: Línea de Negocio, Ingresos, Gastos Directos, Utilidad (antes), Prorrateo, Utilidad (después). 3 rows of data + Total footer row

Frontend_cobranza_por_linea_section.details: Cobranza Pendiente por Línea section visible showing 'Sin clasificar' with S/ 900.00

Frontend_alert_ventas_navigation.details: Ventas pendientes alert navigates correctly to /ventas-pos

Frontend_alert_gastos_navigation.details: Gastos sin prorratear alert navigates correctly to /prorrateo

Frontend_alert_cobranza_navigation.details: Cobranza pendiente alert navigates correctly to /cxc

Frontend_refresh_button.details: Actualizar button works and reloads dashboard data

critical_code_review_comments: Code review PASS: dashboard.py get_resumen_ejecutivo (lines 71-186) correctly queries all required KPIs
Code review PASS: API correctly handles ventas_pendientes with estado_local='pendiente' filter
Code review PASS: gastos_prorrateo_cantidad correctly filters comun/no_asignado without existing prorrateo
Code review PASS: cobranza_pendiente_linea uses LEFT JOIN to include 'Sin clasificar' (null linea_negocio_id)
Code review PASS: utilidad_linea builds from cont_linea_negocio with activo=TRUE and correctly calculates utilidad_antes/despues
Code review PASS: Frontend Dashboard.jsx uses all required data-testid attributes for testing
Code review PASS: Frontend correctly formats currency as S/ X,XXX.XX using es-PE locale
Code review PASS: Alert cards are clickable buttons with proper navigation via useNavigate()

test_data_observed.ingresos_mes: S/ 0.00 (expected - no confirmed sales in current month)

notes.expected_behavior: ingresos_mes=0 and all utilidad_linea values show S/0.00 because there are no confirmed sales in current month (March 2026). This is correct.
notes.cobranza_sin_clasificar: CxC records without linea_negocio_id appear as 'Sin clasificar' - this is correct behavior

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing empresa_id=6 data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Resumen Ejecutivo fully tested. Backend API returns all KPI fields correctly. Frontend shows: Panel de Control header, 3 alert cards (ventas pendientes/gastos sin prorratear/cobranza pendiente), 4 KPI cards, Utilidad por Línea table with footer, Cobranza Pendiente por Línea section. All alert cards navigate correctly. Refresh button works. Data consistency verified between resumen-ejecutivo and legacy kpis endpoints.
